---
title: "cmass_regular_grid"
generated: true
description: "Alias for center_of_mass_grid."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.grid`](../nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cmass_regular_grid -->
`cmass_regular_grid` is an alias for [`center_of_mass_grid`](center_of_mass_grid.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
